app.description: Read and share your favorite manga

home.welcomeSubtitle: Read manga, manhwa and manhua in your language. Track your progress, support scanlation teams and join the community.

home.metaDescription: The best platform to read manga, manhwa and manhua in English. Explore thousands of titles with a clean, distraction-free reading experience.

profile.usernameInvite: Choose a username to get a short, memorable public profile URL.

usernameError.USERNAME_INVALID: Use 3–20 characters: letters, numbers, hyphens and underscores only.

community.title: Community
community.subtitle: A space for readers, teams, and creators.

creatorRequest.title: Request Creator role
creatorRequest.body: The Creator role is for independent authors publishing original manga or comics on MangaZen. It gives you the same Scan panel as scanlation teams to upload chapters, manage your submissions, and add new titles.
creatorRequest.loginCta: Sign in to send your request.
creatorRequest.pendingMessage: We already have your request under review. We will let you know when there is news.
creatorRequest.successMessage: Request sent. An admin will review it soon.
creatorRequest.errorPending: You already have a request in review.
creatorRequest.errorForbidden: Your account cannot send this request.
creatorRequest.errorGeneric: Could not send. Please try again later.
creatorRequest.alreadyCreator: You already have the Creator role. You can open the Scan panel from the user menu.
creatorRequest.staffSkip: Moderation roles do not use this form.
creatorRequest.toastApproved: Your Creator role request was approved!
creatorRequest.toastRejected: Your Creator role request was not approved.

community.metaDescription: Join the MangaZen community. Rankings, feedback, manga requests and more.

feedback.boardSubtitle: Report bugs, suggest improvements, or share praise. The team reads everything — highest scored items surface first.

mangaRequest.title: Request a manga
mangaRequest.subtitle: Suggest a title you’d like to see on MangaZen. The team reviews requests in order; you’ll get a notification when your request is approved or declined.

security.ipRadarNote: Your session ends automatically if we detect access from a different location. Using a VPN can cause unexpected logouts.
security.hideFromRankingsDescription: When enabled, your account will not appear in community reader, donor, or scan rankings.
security.requirePasswordDescription: Actions that add or remove Zen Coins will ask for your password when this is on.
security.requireEmailCodeLabel: Email code for sensitive account changes
security.requireEmailCodeDescription: Changing email or password will require a verification code from your email when those flows are enabled.
security.disablePasswordWarningBody: Without this, anyone using your logged-in session could change Zen Coins without entering your password again.
security.disableEmailCodeWarningBody: Without this, sensitive account changes may be easier if someone else uses your session.
security.revokeAllConfirmDetail: This ends every active session for your account. You will need to sign in again on this device.
security.revokeAllError: Could not end all sessions. Try again.

errors.INVALID_JSON: The request could not be read. Try again.

security.loginReasonIpChange: We closed your session because your network location changed. Avoid VPNs if you see this often.
security.loginReasonAllSessionsRevoked: You signed out on all devices. Sign in again to continue.
security.reauthModalHint: This extra step protects your account.
security.privacySectionHint: Control what signed-in users see on your public profile. Guests without an account only see your name and avatar.
security.isProfilePublicDescription: When off, other logged-in users only see that your profile is private (name and avatar).
security.hideZenFromPublicDescription: Hides your Zen balance from visitors who can see your full profile.
security.hideFavoritesFromPublicDescription: Hides your favorite manga list from visitors.
security.hideReadingStatsFromPublicLabel: Hide reading stats on public profile
security.hideReadingStatsFromPublicDescription: Hides reading status counts and “most read” stats from visitors.

publicProfile.guestCtaBody: Sign in or create an account to see this member’s full profile, badges, and activity.
publicProfile.privateBody: This member has chosen to keep their profile private. Only their name and avatar are visible.

legal.termsMetaDescription: Terms governing use of MangaZen, a community manga hosting platform.
legal.termsLead: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of MangaZen ("we", "us", "our"). By creating an account or using the site, you agree to these Terms.
legal.termsHostingP1: MangaZen is a hosting platform for community-uploaded manga-related content and related tools (including user accounts, reading progress, comments, and features for scan groups and creators). We act strictly as a hosting provider: we do not create, select, or edit the uploaded material.
legal.termsHostingP2: Users who upload or publish content (for example, scan teams or creators) represent that they have the rights or permissions required to make that material available. You understand that third-party uploads may include material to which others claim rights.
legal.termsHostingP3: We may change, limit, or discontinue features to keep the service secure, legal, and sustainable, with reasonable notice when appropriate.
legal.termsEligibilityP1: You must be at least 13 years old to use MangaZen. If you are between 13 and the age of majority where you live, you should use the service only with the consent of a parent or legal guardian.
legal.termsEligibilityP2: You agree that the information you provide when registering is accurate and that you will keep your account information up to date.
legal.termsAccountsP1: You are responsible for safeguarding your credentials and for all activity under your account. Notify us promptly if you suspect unauthorized use.
legal.termsAccountsP2: We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms, pose a security risk, or as required to comply with law or protect other users.
legal.termsZenTitle: 4. Zen Coins and Zen Shards (recognition only)
legal.termsZenP1: Zen Coins and Zen Shards are virtual balances displayed on the platform. They have no cash value, are not legal tender, cannot be redeemed for money, and are non-refundable. They exist as a symbolic recognition mechanism so users can show appreciation for scan teams and community effort.
legal.termsZenP2: Zen Coins and Zen Shards are not wages, fees for views, or guaranteed compensation. Nothing on the platform should be understood as promising payment based on views, traffic, or engagement.
legal.termsZenP3: We may, at our sole discretion, offer discretionary incentives, loyalty-style recognition, or community prizes to particularly active contributors. Any such benefits are gratuitous, non-binding, and do not create an obligation to pay you or anyone else.
legal.termsZenP4: We may adjust balances, rules, or availability of Zen Coins and Zen Shards to maintain fairness, prevent abuse, or comply with applicable requirements.
legal.termsConductLi1: Upload or distribute content you are not authorized to share, or that infringes intellectual property or other rights;
legal.termsConductLi2: Harass, threaten, or defame others, or distribute illegal or harmful material;
legal.termsConductLi3: Attempt to break, disrupt, or overload the service, or access data you are not authorized to access;
legal.termsConductLi4: Use automated systems to scrape or abuse the platform in violation of our technical policies;
legal.termsConductLi5: Impersonate others or misrepresent your affiliation;
legal.termsConductLi6: Circumvent security, access controls, or age or regional restrictions we apply.
legal.termsTerminationP1: You may stop using MangaZen at any time. We may suspend or terminate access for violations of these Terms, legal demands, or operational necessity.
legal.termsTerminationP2: To the extent permitted by law, MangaZen is provided "as is" without warranties of uninterrupted or error-free operation. Our aggregate liability arising out of or relating to the service is limited to the fullest extent permitted by applicable law. Certain jurisdictions do not allow certain exclusions; in those cases, our liability is limited to the minimum extent allowed.
legal.privacyMetaDescription: How MangaZen collects and uses account, technical, and usage data.
legal.privacyLead: We describe how we process personal data when you use MangaZen. By using the service, you acknowledge this Policy alongside our Terms of Service.
legal.privacyCollectP1: Depending on how you use the site, we may process:
legal.privacyCollectLi1: Account data: for example, email address and profile information you provide;
legal.privacyCollectLi2: Technical data: such as IP address, approximate location derived from network information, device and browser identifiers, and logs used for security and reliability;
legal.privacyCollectLi3: Reading progress: data associated with chapters and pages you read, to restore your place and improve the reader experience;
legal.privacyCollectLi4: Zen-Points and related activity: records tied to recognition features on the platform (without treating them as monetary balances);
legal.privacyCollectLi5: Communications: messages you send us (for example, support or legal notices).
legal.privacyUseP1: We use this information to operate and secure the service, authenticate sessions, prevent abuse, comply with law, and improve features (including personalization of the reader and interface where applicable).
legal.privacyUseP2: We do not sell your personal data. We may share information with processors who help us host or operate the service, subject to appropriate agreements, or when required by law or to enforce our policies.
legal.privacyDeleteP1: You may request deletion of your account or certain data by contacting us through the channels we provide. Where we honor a request, associated records may be removed in line with our technical implementation, which may include cascading deletion in our database (for example, related progress or preferences tied to your account).
legal.privacyDeleteP2: Some information may be retained where we have a legitimate need (such as security logs or legal compliance) for a limited period. If you are in a jurisdiction with statutory privacy rights, you may exercise those rights as applicable law allows.
legal.dmcaMetaDescription: Copyright notice and takedown process for MangaZen.
legal.dmcaLead: MangaZen qualifies for limitations on liability under applicable copyright law only if we follow proper notice-and-takedown procedures. We respect intellectual property rights and respond to notices of alleged infringement that meet legal requirements.
legal.dmcaSafeHarborP1: We are a hosting provider. We do not affirmatively monitor all uploads. We remove or disable access to material when we receive a valid infringement notice or when required by law, consistent with safe-harbor frameworks.
legal.dmcaProcessP1: If you believe content on MangaZen infringes your copyright, send a detailed notice to dmca@mangazen.com including: identification of the work, identification of the material and its URL, your contact information, a statement of good-faith belief, a statement of accuracy under penalty of perjury (as required by law), and your physical or electronic signature.
legal.dmcaProcessP2: Incomplete notices may delay processing. If you misrepresent that material is infringing, you may be liable for damages under applicable law.
legal.dmcaTimelineP1: We aim to acknowledge and begin review of qualified notices promptly and, where appropriate, to act within approximately seventy-two (72) hours of receipt, subject to volume, verification, and legal review. Complex cases may take longer.
legal.dmcaRepeatP1: We may terminate or suspend accounts of users who repeatedly infringe copyrights or our policies, in our reasonable discretion and as permitted by law.
legal.cookiesMetaDescription: Session cookies and reader preferences stored locally.
legal.cookiesLead: This policy explains how MangaZen uses browser storage for sessions and reader settings.
legal.cookiesSessionP1: When you sign in, we set HTTP-only first-party cookies for your session. These include mangazen_access_token for authentication; we may also use mangazen_refresh_token and mangazen_user_id to renew and associate your session securely. They are used for security and continuity. You can remove cookies through your browser settings; signing out also clears these cookies in normal operation.
legal.cookiesStorageP1: To improve reading comfort, we may store preferences in your browser using localStorage (not a traditional cookie), such as screen brightness, reading direction (for example, left-to-right or right-to-left), image fit mode, and reading mode (for example, scroll versus page-by-page) in the reader. These values remain on your device unless you clear site data.
legal.cookiesStorageP2: We do not use these mechanisms to track you across unrelated websites.
